parameters.content:
# WhatsApp channel adapter
Receives Meta WhatsApp Cloud API webhooks, verifies the setup challenge, normalizes inbound customer messages, then delegates all sales/RAG/memory logic to the shared Supabase-backed bot core.

Secrets stay in `.env` / n8n environment variables:
- WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN or WA_ACCESS_TOKEN
- WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID
- WHATSAPP_WEBHOOK_VERIFY_TOKEN or WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN
- WHATSAPP_APP_SECRET (optional signature verification later)
- INTERNAL_TEST_TOKEN

Production callback URL: {{$env["N8N_BASE_URL"]}}/webhook/whatsapp-rag-webhook

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { tenant_id: $json.tenant_id, channel: $json.channel, thread_id: $json.thread_id, sender_id: $json.sender_id, sender_username: $json.sender_username, sender_display_name: $json.sender_display_name, message_text: $json.message_text, message_id: $json.message_id, raw_event: $json.raw_event } }}
={{ { messaging_product: "whatsapp", recipient_type: "individual", to: $json.to, type: "text", text: { preview_url: false, body: $json.body } } }}
